description: Held-out evaluation set — queries not used to develop AGENT.md corrections
purpose: Independent validation that agent improvements generalize beyond training-query tuning.

stockindex.rationale: Financial time-series + geography filters; tests general methodology (dates, single-winner output) without Yelp-specific corrections.

yelp.note: Yelp queries are the primary driver for join-key, attribute, and aggregation guidance in KB and AGENT.md.

baseline_scores.documentation: Populate from eval/score_log.json or strict score log after dated runs. Each run_record includes methodology_notes (models, dab_root, timeout).
baseline_scores.example_metric: pass_at_1 = passed / total_queries per dataset run
